Module com.github.oshi.ffm

module com.github.oshi.ffm
FFM-based native implementation of the OSHI API for JDK 25+.

This module uses the Foreign Function and Memory (FFM) API for native access and currently supports Windows, macOS, and Linux. For broader platform support, use the JNA-based com.github.oshi module.

Usage: 

SystemInfoProvider si = SystemInfoFactory.create();
HardwareAbstractionLayer hal = si.getHardware();
OperatingSystem os = si.getOperatingSystem();
Re-using the same SystemInfo instance optimizes caching and CPU performance; creating a new instance minimizes memory usage.
See Also:
  • SystemInfo

  • Packages

    Exports
    Package
    Description
    oshi.ffm
    Provides FFM access to system libraries and cross-platform utilities
    oshi.ffm.util
     
    oshi.ffm.util.gpu
    FFM-based utility classes for optional vendor GPU library integration (NVML, ADL).
    oshi.ffm.util.platform.mac
    FFM-based utilities for macOS.
    oshi.ffm.util.platform.windows
    FFM-based utilities for Windows.
